agent: agent

Follow the instructions in [Generate Tests Prompt](generate.tests.prompt.md) and
generate the tests for the supplied modules.

**We are in active development. We may need to update source to fix flawed
business logic. We do not need to keep APIs stable or worry about backward
compatibility. If problems are identified that require changes across other
modules, let's make those changes. Prioritize the right fix rather than the
quick fix.**
